pages.text_excerpt: About - Fabian Hamilton MP Skip to main content About Contact Work in Parliament Supporting Leeds North East More Menu About Fabian is the UK Trade Envoy to the Southern Cone Fabian Hamilton was elected as the Labour Member of Parliament for Leeds North East in 1997. In Parliament, Fabian has served as member of the Foreign Affairs Select Committee and Transport Select Committee following his time as the Labour Party’s Shadow Minister for Peace and Disarmament, Latin America and the Caribbean. Since his election to Parliament, Fabian has championed multilateral disarmament and international peacebuilding alongside sustainable and reliable public and active travel. Alongside regional responsibilities in Latin America and the Caribbean, Fabian has been responsible for Labour Party policy on arms control, the non-proliferation of nuclear weapons, conflict prevention and the UK’s soft power. Fabian currently serves as the Prime Minister’s Trade Envoy to the Southern Cone – Argentina, Paraguay and Uruguay. He is also Chair of the British Group Inter-Parliamentary Union. Fabian Chairs several All Party Parliamentary Groups, including Cycling and Walking, Latin America, and Human Rights (International). He is married with three children and two grandchildren and is a keen cyclist and amateur photographer. In 2016, Fabian authored a report into the UK’s housing crisis entitled ‘Building Homes for Britain’. You can view or download the report here – http://fabianhamilton.laboursites.org/wp-content/uploads/sites/1005/2022/03/BuildingHomes_compressed.pdf You can view Fabian’s recent activity in Parliament below. pages.text_excerpt: Contact - Fabian Hamilton MP Skip to main content About Contact Work in Parliament Supporting Leeds North East More Menu Contact Fabian Hamilton MP Address 147A Easterly Road, Roundhay, Leeds, UK View on Google Maps Telephone 0113 249 6600 Email [email protected] IMPORTANT – Fabian can only help if you are a resident of North East Leeds. You must leave your full name, full address and postcode or you may not receive a response. If you are not sure if Fabian is your MP, you can find out here – https://members.parliament.uk/FindYourMP You can find contact details for your local councillor here – https://democracy.leeds.gov.uk/mgFindMember.aspx Follow Fabian on Social Media Contact details 147A Easterly Road, Roundhay, Leeds, UK View on Google Maps Email: [email protected] Further details Promoted by James Whitley, both at 147A Easterly Road, Leeds, LS8 2RY. ©2026 Copyright All rights reserved Privacy Policy Disability Access Cookie Policy Link to Instagram Link to X (Twitter) Link to YouTube Link to Facebook Link to LinkedIn Link to Snapchat Link to Bluesky Link to TikTok Close Fax Website Location Phone Email Calendar Building Search Arrow Chevron
